hero.subtitle: EduAI is your personal AI tutor for Egyptian students. Get instant help, personalized learning, and better results across all major curricula.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by 50,000+ students and parents across Egypt

features.personalizedDesc: Tailored to your level and pace

howItWorks.subtitle: EduAI's continuous learning loop helps you study smarter, stay consistent, and achieve your goals.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Learn with AI explanations, videos, notes, and examples that are easy to understand.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Practice with AI-generated questions, quizzes, and real exam-style exercises.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Track your performance and identify strengths and weak areas.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Get personalized recommendations and smart study plans to improve continuously.

curricula.subtitle: EduAI supports the leading curricula in Egypt and around the world — designed to match your learning goals and academic path.
curricula.egyptianDesc: Aligned with the Ministry of Education curriculum in Egypt.
curricula.americanDesc: Based on US standards with a focus on critical thinking and real-world skills.
curricula.britishDesc: Internationally recognized qualifications from Cambridge Assessment.
curricula.ibDesc: A holistic approach that develops inquiry, knowledge and global mindset.
curricula.alignedDesc: All lessons, quizzes, and materials are aligned with the official syllabus of each curriculum.
curricula.personalizedDesc: We adapt to your curriculum, grade, and learning style.
curricula.updatedDesc: Syllabus updates are tracked and content is updated regularly.
curricula.seamlessDesc: Switch between curricula easily if your academic path changes.

audiences.subtitle: Whether you're learning, supporting, or teaching — EduAI adapts to you.
audiences.studentsHeading: Everything You Need To Learn, In One Place
audiences.studentsSubheading: EduAI dashboard gives you a clear overview of your tasks, progress, and personalized learning journey.
audiences.studentsPoint1: Track your tasks and deadlines at a glance
audiences.studentsPoint2: See your progress across every subject
audiences.studentsPoint3: Follow a learning path built just for you
audiences.parentsSubheading: Get a complete overview of your child's learning journey, progress, and well-being — all in one place.
audiences.parentsPoint2: Alerts on strengths, gaps, and study habits
audiences.teachersSubheading: Powerful AI tools and insights to help you create better lessons, understand your students, and save time.
audiences.teachersPoint1: Generate lessons and quizzes with AI

cta.heading: Ready to Learn Smarter?
cta.subtitle: Join students, parents, and teachers already using EduAI to achieve more — every day.

footer.tagline: Your personal AI tutor — smarter learning for every student, parent, and teacher in Egypt and beyond.
